subject: TechCorp API v2→v3 Migration Timeline for DataSync Integration
body:
Hi Partnerships Team,

Please forward this migration notification to our integration partner DataSync.

---

Dear DataSync Team,

We're writing to inform you of an important update regarding our API infrastructure. TechCorp is migrating from API v2 to API v3, which will improve performance, reliability, and security for all integrations.

**Migration Timeline:**
- **Announcement:** Effective immediately
- **v2 Deprecation Period:** Now through Q3 2026
- **v3 Public Availability:** Available now
- **v2 Sunset:** September 30, 2026

**What You Need to Do:**
Please migrate your integration to use our v3 API endpoints before the v2 sunset date. All existing v2 API keys will cease functioning after September 30, 2026.

**Resources:**
- Complete migration guide and endpoint mappings are available at: https://docs.company.internal/api/v3-migration
- Code examples and SDKs for v3 are available in our developer portal
- Our support team is available to assist with any technical questions

If you have questions or require assistance with migration planning, please contact our partnerships team.

Thank you for your partnership. We're excited about the improvements v3 will bring to our integration ecosystem.

Best regards,
TechCorp Partnerships
